XNetQosServiceLookup

Queries the quality of service (QoS) between the local Xbox console and the Xbox Live service.

INT XNetQosServiceLookup(
    DWORD dwFlags,
    WSAEVENT hEvent,
    XNQOS * * ppxnqos
);

Parameters

dwFlags
The title should set this parameter to zero; no flags are currently supported.
hEvent

Handle to an event that is signaled whenever any of the following flags are set in the bFlags member of the XNQOSINFO structure:
  • XNET_XNQOSINFO_COMPLETE
  • XNET_XNQOSINFO_TARGET_CONTACTED

See the XNQOSINFO documentation for more information about these flags.

This parameter is optional and may be NULL.

ppxnqos
Pointer to a pointer to an XNQOS structure that receives the results of the QoS probes. The axnqosinfo member of the XNQOS structure points to an XNQOSINFO structure that contains the detailed QoS data. The title must call XNetQosRelease to free the memory associated with these structures.

Return Values

Returns zero if successful, an error code otherwise.

Remarks

The XNetQosServiceLookup function is both simpler and more accurate than XNetQosLookup. Use XNetQosServiceLookup to measure QoS between the local Xbox console and the Xbox Live service. Use XNetQosLookup only to measure QoS between the local Xbox console and a remote Xbox consoles.

The XNetQosServiceLookup function is asynchronous. The function returns immediately even though the QoS probes are still in progress. Check the bFlags member of the XNQOSINFO structure pointed to by the axnqosinfo member of XNQOS to determine whether the QoS results have been received.

To cancel the lookup before it is complete, your program can call XNetQosRelease. This terminates the lookup immediately without waiting for any further network traffic, and there are no side effects. However, your program cannot dereference the XNQOS structure returned through the XNetQosServiceLookup function's ppxnqos parameter after calling XNetQosRelease.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Winsockx.h.

Import Library: Use Xonline.lib or xnets.lib.

See Also

Xbox Secure Network Library Functions | XNetQosLookup, XNetQosRelease, XNQOS, XNQOSINFO
